claimRefund(uint256).details: Anyone can trigger refund after expiry for Funded or Submitted jobs

params.provider: Address of the provider (can be zero address to be set later)

reject(uint256,bytes32).details: Can reject from Funded (before submission) or Submitted (after submission)

params.deliverable: Reference to bug report (e.g., JSONL line hash or repo path)

cancel(uint256).notice: Cancel a job before funding (client only, Open → Rejected)

claimRefund(uint256).notice: Claim refund for expired job (ERC-8183 compliant)

complete(uint256,bytes32).notice: Complete a job and release payment (ERC-8183 compliant)

createJob(address,address,uint256,string.notice: Create a new bug bounty job (ERC-8183 compliant)

fund(uint256,uint256).notice: Fund a job with USDC (ERC-8183 compliant)

setBudget(uint256,uint256).notice: Set the budget for a job (ERC-8183 compliant)

setProvider(uint256,address).notice: Set the provider for a job (ERC-8183 compliant)
